title: VPG Engine — Moves
description: Schema for the move catalog. Each move references one or more groups in move-slots.json to declare which slots it's eligible for.

schema_version.description: Increment when the schema shape changes in a breaking way.

field_definitions.description: Human-readable documentation of each field. Not validated structurally.

snake_case_id.description: snake_case identifier: lowercase letters, digits, and underscores; must start with a letter.

move_id.description: Move identifier. Looser than other ids — allows leading digits (e.g. '450_splash', '10_punch') because real wrestling moves use them. Must be lowercase, digits, and underscores only.

position.description: Must mirror the position enum in move-slots.schema.json.

power.description: Power grade S (highest) through G (lowest), or null for moves that do no damage (taunts, evasion).

feature.description: 'pin' for moves ending in a pin attempt, 'submit' for submission attempts, null for neither.

groups.description: References to group ids from move-slots.json. Cross-file integrity is validated separately.
